concept: Industrial Confectionery Luxury - Precision Engineering meets Rich Heritage

headings.usage: Used for Marketing Headings, the main Clock, 'Welcome back', and high-impact metric values.

body.usage: Used for all dashboard data, navigation, buttons, and tabular numbers. Provides geometric precision.

colors.description: Deep obsidian/navy base with electric SaniXperts blue accents and brushed-chrome highlights. Matches the blue-flame droplet logo. Avoid pure black to prevent flatness; layer subtle navy gradients.

visual_enhancers.textures: Apply subtle CSS noise or radial gradients using #C5A059 at 5% opacity to break up flat dark backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #332D29 for subtle card separation. Use primary gold color for active states.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#332D29] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0_0_#332D29] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:translate-x-[2px] font-sans font-medium
buttons.clock_action: Massive, highly tactile button. When inactive: muted outline. When active/clocking in: glowing primary gold with 'tracing beam' border.

cards.base: bg-card border border-border rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors duration-300
cards.shift_card: Interactive card. Active shift gets a soft gold glow and border. Inactive shifts are faded (opacity-60).

coming_soon_badge.classes: absolute inset-0 z-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-lg
coming_soon_badge.text: text-primary font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] border border-primary/50 px-4 py-1 rounded-full text-xs

live_clock.description: Massive font-serif digital clock displaying current hours, minutes, and seconds. Use framer-motion AnimatePresence to slide up/down numbers as they change.

grids.admin_analytics: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 (Charts span 8, summaries span 4)

layouts.navigation: Side navigation for admin (collapsed by default to show more data) or a premium glassmorphic top header. For employee clock-in, use a minimalist top header with the SaniXperts logo.
layouts.spacing: Generous inner padding for cards (p-6 to p-8). Tight spacing for data tables to maintain industrial density.

motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1) for all dashboard cards using framer-motion. Stagger delay: 0.1s.
motion.hover_states: Micro-interactions on all buttons and cards. scale: 1.02 or subtle inner border glow.
motion.clock_tick: Number ticker animation for the seconds in the live facility clock.

accessibility.motion_preference: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for framer-motion animations.

hero_background.description: Luxurious abstract gold and dark curves for the sign-in page split screen.

card_texture.description: Secondary dark/gold abstract texture for premium banners or card backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Lucide React for all icons (e.g., Factory, Clock, Fingerprint, Lock, Calendar, Users).
Install and use 'framer-motion' for staggered entrance animations and the live clock number ticker.
Install and use 'recharts' for the Admin dashboard analytics. Customize the charts to use the specified gold/brown/grey palette. NO default blue/purple colors.
Implement the 'Request Absence' section as a highly visual 'Coming Soon' card using the frosted glass badge component.
The Clock In / Clock Out functionality must be the centerpiece of the employee dashboard. Make the button massive and satisfying, with clear active/inactive states.
Do not use generic border-radius. Follow a slightly sharper aesthetic (rounded-md or rounded-none with brutalist shadows) to emulate industrial precision, paired with the luxury gold.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: NEVER use generic, 'on-distribution' AI outputs. Avoid simplistic gradients and centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism.
DO NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., `transition: all`). Add transitions strictly for specific interactive elements.
DO NOT center align the app container. Respect natural reading flow.
Use modern button styles (sharp corners with industrial offset shadows as specified).
NEVER use AI assistant emojis (🤖, 💭, 💡). Use Lucide icons strictly.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, focus states).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical for breathing room, except in data-dense tables.
DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for overlays or headers. Always use solid or heavily blurred backdrops.
All .js files must adhere to this guideline, not .tsx (since the environment uses React .js files).
